description: CompositionBlue, grey and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with fabric tape on the inseam, front buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and buttoned mid-sleeve flaps, buttoned flap pocket on the left chest with stitch detailing, stitch detailing on the back right shoulder and a curved hemlineFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironChecks that add immense attitude to your wardrobe is what basics brings into your life. The full sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill at bay, and you can roll them up and secure them with the buttoned flaps to suit your style. Team this shirt with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool. Size and FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
